data.body: DEPLOY ATTESTATION (2026-07-13): autolander DEPLOYED + LIVE on the Gerrit host (i-00880b2c) — container healthy/0-restarts, flock+heartbeat+recovery in gerrit_autolander volume, autoheal sidecar, status endpoint via nginx (200 JSON), SSM token, CloudWatch alarm, Gerrit Autosubmit+rebase ACLs.
